visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in the driver's seat of a car at night. He has short dark hair and is wearing a black t-shirt. The background is dark and blurry, suggesting the interior of the vehicle and a dimly lit environment outside. In the top left corner of the screen, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the driver's emotional reaction. The man's face is initially tense, with his mouth open as if speaking urgently. A man speaks in a slightly rushed and apologetic tone, saying, "Ah, I have something to do, I'm leaving first." His voice then shifts, becoming strained and filled with a pained, almost tearful emotion as he lets out a choked, emotional sound, as if he's trying to hold back tears. He then breaks into a pained, forced smile, looking towards the passenger. The shot then shifts slightly to a profile view of the driver, showing his emotional distress as he continues to look towards his companion in the passenger seat. The passenger is out of focus in the background. The audio is dominated by the man's voice, with no other significant background sounds or music present.
